zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Echyngham於大約1359年出生在英國素可時，她的父親Sir William Echyngham27歲，母親Elizabeth Criol24歲。她和Arnold Savage II至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於大約1413年在英國肯特波炳享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特波炳。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Echyngham于大约1359年出生在英国素可时，她的父亲Sir William Echyngham27岁，母亲Elizabeth Criol24岁。她和Arnold Savage II至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于大约1413年在英国肯特波炳享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特波炳。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Echyngham was born about 1359, in Sussex, England, her father, Sir William Echyngham, was 27 and her mother, Elizabeth Criol, was 24. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Arnold Savage II. She died about 1413, in Bobbing, Kent, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Bobbing, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Echyngham est née environ 1359, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Echyngham, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Criol, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Arnold Savage II. Elle est décédée environ 1413, à Bobbing, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Bobbing, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Echyngham um 1359 in Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Echyngham 27 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Criol 24. Sie hatte mit Arnold Savage II mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1413 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Bobbing, Kent, England und wurde in Bobbing, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Echyngham è nata il circa 1359 nel Sussex, England, sua padre, Sir William Echyngham, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Criol, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Arnold Savage II. Morì circa 1413, nel Bobbing, Kent, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Bobbing, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Echynghamが約1359年にイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Sir William Echynghamは27歳，母Elizabeth Criolは24歳であった。彼女はArnold Savage IIとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1413年にイギリスケントボビングで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントボビングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Echyngham(이)가 대략 1359년 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Echyngham(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Criol(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Arnold Savage II(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1413년 영국 켄트 보브빙에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 보브빙에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Echyngham nasceu aproximadamente 1359, em Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Echyngham, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Criol, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Arnold Savage II. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1413, em Bobbing, Kent, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Bobbing, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Echyngham родилась около 1359 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Echyngham было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Criol, 24. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Arnold Savage II. Она умерла около 1413 г. в местности боббинг, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности боббинг, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Echyngham nació aproximadamente 1359, en Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Echyngham, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Criol, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Arnold Savage II. Murió aproximadamente 1413, en Bobbing, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Bobbing, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
